pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: While not as physically strong as $(item)Demons$(), Imps are much more aggressive, naughty and mischievous. Flame Imps can be easily swayed if they have a personal gain.

pages.title: Taming Imps
pages.description: While Imps are notoriously aggressive, they can make a pact with a player.$(br)Give the Imp a $(l:artifacts/misc/demonic_contract)Demonic Contract$(/l) signed with blood (by crafting it with a bound $(l:artifacts/misc/taglock_kit)Taglock kit$(/l)) and make sure to have something to trade. $(item)25 Experience Levels$() should suffice.$(p)When tamed, the Flame Imp will protect its master from any hostile entities.

pages.title: Imp Trading
pages.description: An Imp with a bound contract will trade with its master. A player can give the Imp items that it deems valuable, called $(item)Shinies$(). Once enough shinies have been gifted to the Imp, it will give a valuable in return. It is advised to not give too many shinies to Imps, as they might get tired of them.
pages._comment: Unlocked when the player trades with an Imp

pages.title: Imp Magic
pages.description: A Flame Imp can be bound to a service. When a $(l:artifacts/misc/demonic_contract)Demonic Contract$(/l) is signed with blood and given to an Imp, it will require a costly down-payment of Experience Levels.$(p)Once the deal is struck, the Imp will be bound to the location of the deal, not able to wonder too far away, and will attack anyone hostile to its master.$(br)Imp Magic effects can be removed by dying or eating a $(l:resources/frozen_heart)Frozen Heart$(/l)
pages._comment: Unlocked when a player gives a spell contract to an Imp

pages.title: Demon Hearts
pages.description: Using a $(l:artifacts/devices/demon_heart)Demon Heart$(/l) on an Imp will cause it to temporarily greatly grow in both size and strength. In this state the Imp cannot trade or perform Imp Magic. Using an $(l:resources/icy_needle)Icy Needle$(/l) on the creature will make it return to their normal size again.
pages._comment: Unlocked when a player uses a Demon Heart on an Imp
